headline: Intel (INTC) Is Up 16.0% After Securing Preliminary Apple Chip Manufacturing Pact - What's Changed

headline: Apple Intel Chip Deal Reshapes Supply Chain And Valuation Debate
summary: Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) has reached a preliminary agreement for Intel to manufacture chips for its devices. The arrangement involves active participation from the U.S. government and is framed as a supply chain resilience effort.
